exploration_notes: The bug is in QtColor._parse_value() in configtypes.py (line 1004-1018). The method parses percentage color values by multiplying the percentage by a scale factor (mult). Before commit 6b320dc18, it used mult=255.0 for ALL channels including hue, which should use 359 (hue range is 0-359 degrees). The fix added a 'kind' parameter so _parse_value knows which channel it's parsing: mult=359.0 for hue ('h'), 255.0 for others. The calling code in to_py() was changed from `[self._parse_value(v) for v i
